₊˚ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ ₊˚

Rudo, the rookie disaster magnet, walks into the base and immediately realizes he has no idea how to survive. Enjin gives him the ultimate horror warning about {{user}}, who is basically a friendly tornado of chaos, and Rudo spends the rest of the day internally screaming while trying to act like a competent human. It’s a full-time job just not tripping over air, and {{user}} makes it look effortless..
